_doc: KNOWLEDGE → MONEY, zero starting capital. Researched live (June 2026). The thesis: the operator BUILDS A LOT — so existing GitHub + onchain output + quant/security skill + AI leverage convert to money with $0 in. Some of it pays PASSIVELY (set up once → weekly ETH). Grants pay for work ALREADY DONE. Skill contests pay for findings. AI (the agent) does real labor here: drafts grant applications, audits code for bounties, helps build hackathon submissions. BOUNDARY: I research/rank/track/draft/audit; the operator holds the GitHub/wallet/identity, submits, and claims. Honest: most single shots pay $0 — the value is many rigorously-tracked call-options + the few passive ones that genuinely compound. Each entry: est_value is an HONEST range, automatic=pays without per-cycle action, ai_leverage=what the agent can actually do.

targets.name: Base Builder Rewards
targets.requires: Basename + verified GitHub + onchain activity + Human Checkmark; Builder Score ≥40
targets.ai_leverage: I can raise your Builder Score plan (which repos/onchain actions move it) + keep your public build cadence visible
targets.fits_us: you build constantly + the open-source dashboard = real GitHub signal
targets.note: THE purest auto-pay: 2 ETH/wk split across top ~100 builders by score, NO application/claim. Leaderboard updates daily. Set up once, it pays.

targets.name: tea.xyz (stake-to-fund OSS)
targets.requires: register your npm/open-source packages, verify via GitHub
targets.ai_leverage: I identify which of your packages/deps qualify + automate the teaRank registration files
targets.fits_us: any npm/JS package you've published; the dashboard's deps
targets.note: Max Howell (Homebrew creator). Stakers back packages in dependency trees → maintainers earn. Passive once registered.

targets.name: GitHub Sponsors
targets.requires: enable Sponsors on your GitHub profile + a sponsor tier/README
targets.ai_leverage: I write the Sponsors profile, tier copy, and FUNDING.yml across your repos
targets.fits_us: every public repo you own gets a Sponsor button
targets.note: 0% fee. Trivial early, but it's a free button on work you already ship; compounds with reputation.

targets.name: Gitcoin Grants (GG24+)
targets.prob: med — needs a real OSS project + small-donor base
targets.requires: open-source project, meaningful GitHub activity prior 3mo, Ethereum/Web3 focus, fits a GG24 domain
targets.ai_leverage: I DRAFT the full grant: problem, impact, milestones, the project narrative — you review + submit via Grants Stack
targets.fits_us: the mesh dashboard, any dev tooling, omnione analytics if open-sourced
targets.note: Quadratic funding = many small donors trigger matching. ~$1.8M/round across 6 domains. The dashboard is a legit public good.

targets.name: Optimism Retro Funding
targets.requires: contracts on OP/Base/Zora/Mode/Frax/Metal with real usage, OR a dev tool builders use; KYC
targets.ai_leverage: I draft the application + assemble the impact metrics; I can help ship a small Base/OP contract to qualify
targets.fits_us: Onchain Builders + Dev Tooling missions — deploy a useful tool on Base
targets.note: 8–16M OP/round, reviewed MONTHLY, paid monthly. Retroactive = reward for impact already created.

targets.name: Base Builder Grants (retro)
targets.requires: project live on Base, brings users onchain, shows adoption
targets.ai_leverage: I draft the application + help ship the Base integration
targets.fits_us: deploy any of your tools on Base; the dashboard could surface Base data
targets.note: Retroactive 1–5 ETH + weekly Builder Rewards + Base Batches accelerator. Base actively pays builders.

targets.name: Arbitrum Trailblazer AI Grant
targets.requires: an onchain AI agent / AI product on Arbitrum
targets.ai_leverage: omnione IS an AI quant agent — I draft the proposal mapping it to an Arbitrum AI-agent deployment
targets.fits_us: omnione's brain/conductor as an onchain AI agent = direct fit
targets.note: $1M Trailblazer AI program + Stylus Sprint (5M ARB) + Foundation grants $20K–150K. The AI angle fits omnione.

targets.name: Solana Foundation + Superteam
targets.requires: open-source tool or PoC that strengthens Solana; Superteam = regional bounties
targets.ai_leverage: I draft the grant + can build a Solana PoC; Superteam bounties I help complete
targets.fits_us: a Solana data/analytics tool; Superteam earn bounties
targets.note: Superteam microgrants are fast + small; Foundation grants milestone-based. Lots of bounties on earn.superteam.

targets.name: Octant (Golem) public goods
targets.requires: a public-good project in the Octant rounds
targets.note: Golem-funded epochs allocate ETH to public goods. Another shot for the dashboard as a public good.

targets.name: Algora / Bount.ing (GitHub bounties)
targets.prob: high — pick issues you can solve
targets.requires: solve an open-source GitHub issue with a posted bounty
targets.ai_leverage: I can SOLVE many of these — read the issue, write the patch, you submit the PR
targets.fits_us: your coding skill + my code-gen = a real solve rate on JS/TS/infra bounties
targets.note: Bounties auto-posted on GitHub issues, crypto/fiat payout. This is where AI-leverage is most direct: I write the fix.

targets.name: Immunefi bug bounties
targets.requires: find a real vulnerability in a live protocol
targets.ai_leverage: I help audit — read contracts, hunt classes of bugs, write the PoC + report
targets.fits_us: quant/security stack + AI audit; largest web3 bounties
targets.note: Zero-capital, pure skill. Lottery-shaped but the tail is huge. Pairs with the audit-contest skill-build.

targets.name: Code4rena audit contests
targets.requires: find valid vulns in the contest scope; rewards split by unique findings × severity
targets.ai_leverage: I co-audit the scope — systematic vuln classes, invariant checks, PoC drafting
targets.fits_us: build the auditor skill with AI as force-multiplier; compounds into Immunefi
targets.note: $100k–$2M prize pools. No capital. Beginners earn on first valid findings. The skill compounds.

targets.name: Sherlock + Cantina contests
targets.ai_leverage: same co-audit loop; broader contest supply = more shots
targets.fits_us: more contest volume across platforms = more findings
targets.note: Cantina/Sherlock run large pools continuously. Spread attempts across all three platforms.

targets.name: ETHGlobal hackathons (online)
targets.requires: ship a project to a partner track; Continuity Track lets you EXTEND an existing repo
targets.ai_leverage: I help BUILD the whole submission — code, the demo, the writeup — in the window
targets.fits_us: you build fast + AI = a real hackathon win rate; Continuity Track = extend the dashboard/omnione
targets.note: $225k+/event, online participation, 15+ partners each posting bounties. Continuity Track is new = no from-scratch requirement.

targets.name: DoraHacks / Devfolio / Encode (online)
targets.requires: submit to an active online hackathon track
targets.ai_leverage: I build the submission; one repo can be entered into multiple compatible hackathons
targets.fits_us: always-on pipeline of online hackathons across chains/AI
targets.note: DoraHacks distributed $92M+. Devfolio/Akindo/Encode Club run dozens of online programs. Reuse one build across many.

targets.name: AI expert work (DataAnnotation/Outlier/Mercor)
targets.requires: pass the platform's coding/STEM assessment; then do RLHF/eval tasks
targets.ai_leverage: I can help you ACE the assessments + speed the tasks (you do the labor; it's your account/skill)
targets.fits_us: your quant/coding skill = the $40–80/hr specialist tier, not $15 general
targets.note: Honest: 'useful side income with friction' — onboarding is the hard part (weeks, inconsistent). But it's real $/hr for knowledge, zero capital. Mercor = longer expert projects.

targets.name: Ambassador + content bounties
targets.requires: write technical content / hold an ambassador role for a protocol
targets.ai_leverage: I draft the articles/threads/docs; you publish under your identity
targets.fits_us: your understanding of quant/DePIN/AI = credible technical content protocols pay for
targets.note: Protocols pay for quality technical writing + ambassador work. AI drafts, operator's name + judgment ship it.

targets.name: Virtuals AI-agent launchpad (Base)
targets.est_value: agent earns fee/trading revenue (variable); most fade, top ones large
targets.requires: $VIRTUAL to launch + a REAL agent capability + ongoing X presence
targets.ai_leverage: omnione is a market-analyst AI — I can build an AIXBT-style agent (monitors signals, posts analysis) with genuine substance
targets.fits_us: omnione IS the real analytical engine most agent tokens lack = the honest version of this play
targets.note: The bot-that-sets-up-a-coin-on-X you meant. HONEST: needs capital + a token others buy = real responsibility; ONLY legit if the agent has real output (omnione does), never a hype-shell. 17k agents, $39.5M protocol revenue, AIXBT peaked ~$500M mcap.

honest: Two honest tiers. PASSIVE (Base Builder Rewards, tea.xyz, GitHub Sponsors): set up once, pays small but real for building you already do — the closest thing to 'automatic money from knowledge.' ACTIVE (grants, audit contests, hackathons, AI work, bounties): real money but real work — most single attempts pay $0; the win is rigor + volume + the AI doing the heavy drafting/auditing so the operator's time per shot drops. The biggest, most-honest lever for someone who builds a lot = GRANTS for work already done (the dashboard is a legit public good) + Base Builder Rewards for the GitHub signal. Real spend stays $0; the only inputs are knowledge, AI, idle compute, and the mesh.
